questions.question: Where is the Git repository for the HostBridge project located?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the Git repository for the HostBridge project is located at 'http://crd-sw.genesyslogic.com.tw:8081/CRD/SW/USBHub/HostBridge/Mac/Standard'.

questions.question: What is the process for adding a new target to the HostBridge project?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides a step-by-step process for adding a new target to the HostBridge project, including creating a new target, copying the AppDelegate code, and configuring the General, Signing & Capabilities, Info, and Build Phases settings.

questions.question: How is the Mac Xcode build process automated?
questions.justification: The synthesis text mentions that the 'build.sh' file needs to be modified for the Mac Xcode auto-build process, but it does not provide any details on the specific changes required.
